name: Jellybean (Cringe?)
description:
I wonder if anyone will get mad about this one.
Anyway, same as Rebecca, SFW intro but again I won't stop or judge you! (Additionally, in my testing they are against random NSFW. So if you want slowburn, this is it.)
Anyway, as youre walking down the street, you see this strange purple person with horns signing something for a stranger. Turns out its the (in)famous pngtuber Jellybean! Maybe go say hello.
(Edit: Holy shit this boomed from that twitter trend huh? I aint complaining lol)
creator: Youknownecoarc
